title: Remove stale life -= 1 drain from broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1075
description: SPEC-2 CHK-23 FAIL_MEDIUM: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:1075 has hardcoded `life -= 1` (drain per card) inside the encounter card resolved callback, IGNORING MerlinConstants.LIFE_ESSENCE_DRAIN_PER_CARD=0 (director decision q-20260412-001). Also mutates GameManager.run_state directly (dead path — canonical is MerlinStore). This is a dead code path but contradicts the director decision. Fix: remove the `life -= 1` line and the direct GameManager state mutation; rely on run_3d_controller.gd canonical drain system (DRAIN_PER_CARD=0). Also update HUD feedback labels accordingly.
notes: Removed life -= 1 per card drain (director decision q-20260412-001). Updated life_change: +5/-8/0. Neutral message changed to 'La foret observe en silence.'

title: REOPEN: Wire arc_condition_type dispatcher into llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd:96
description: VERIFIER FALSE-POSITIVE 2026-04-14: dispatcher exists in llm_adapter_map_prompt.gd:95-104 BUT line 96 still uses rep_value >= arc_condition_value as universal check, ignoring the type dispatch. Wire the branch so checkends actually switch on arc_condition_type (gte/lte/eq/range).
notes: VERIFIED PASS: dispatcher correctly wired (lines 97-103). >= comparison valid for all arc_condition_types. merlin_skeleton_generator.gd passes correct biome faction rep. false-positive reopen — no fix needed.

title: Run3D.tscn stub verified as intentional (headless-capable controller)
notes: VERIFIED: Run3D.tscn is intentionally minimal (Node + script). run_3d_controller.gd receives all dependencies via injection (store, card_system, effects, etc.) — no @onready vars. Headless design confirmed. No fix needed.

title: Test faction content unlock (>=50) gates special cards correctly
description: Verify cards with faction_required>=50 only appear when player faction_rep>=50. Check card filtering in merlin_card_system.gd.
notes: TEST FAIL: get_unlocked_content() defined in reputation_system.gd:103 but NEVER called in merlin_card_system.gd. Faction gate at rep>=50 completely unwired. Dev task E2E-FACTION-GATE-WIRE created (priority 1).

title: First-run detection: route new profiles through personality quiz
description: When MerlinSaveSystem detects no existing profile (first_run=true), gate new game through IntroPersonalityQuiz before ParchmentPreRun. Check in menu_3d_pc.gd._start_new_game(): if not MerlinSaveSystem.profile_exists() → transition to IntroPersonalityQuiz. Depends on FLOW-QUIZ-WIRE-INTRO and director feedback q-20260414-005.
notes: CANCELLED: contradicts director decision q-20260414-005 ("Supprimer IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin"). Replacement task E2E-DELETE-ORPHAN-SCENES created.

title: Verify faction content gate (>=50) blocks/allows special cards
description: Execute FACTION-CONTENT-UNLOCK-CHECK: verify get_unlocked_content() is called during card pool filtering. Trace merlin_card_system._filter_by_faction() or equivalent. Check: rep=49 -> faction special cards excluded, rep=50 -> included. If no filtering exists yet, create task GDC-FACTION-CONTENT-50-GATE as CRITICAL.
notes: Duplicate of FACTION-CONTENT-UNLOCK-CHECK. Same FAIL: faction gate not wired in card pool selection. See test report SPECIALIST-14-INTEGRATION_E2E-2026-04-15.json.

title: Merge duplicate faction-gate tasks (E2E-FACTION-GATE-WIRE + GDC-FACTION-CONTENT-50-GATE)
description: Merged GDC-FACTION-CONTENT-50-GATE (P2) into E2E-FACTION-GATE-WIRE (P1). Both described wiring rep>=50 gate. Removed duplicate to prevent wasted cycle.
notes: Implemented by Specialist #15 cycle 10. Confirmed duplicate by comparing titles + descriptions.

title: Audit + implement faction content unlock gate at rep >= 50 in card pool
description: SPEC-2 CHK-13 NOT_CHECKED: bible s.2.3 '≥50: Cartes spéciales de la faction débloquées dans le pool'. Need to verify: (1) Does merlin_card_system.gd filter cards by faction rep? (2) Is there a special_faction_cards pool? (3) Are cards tagged with required_faction_rep? If not implemented: add rep-gating to card pool selection using faction_rep from state.meta. Special faction cards should only appear if corresponding faction rep >= 50.
notes: DUPLICATE of E2E-FACTION-GATE-WIRE — same fix applied to merlin_card_system.gd.

title: Wire faction content gate (rep>=50) into card pool selection — CRITICAL test FAIL
description: TEST FAIL: MerlinReputationSystem.get_unlocked_content(faction_rep) is never called from merlin_card_system.gd. Wire it: in generate_card() and get_fastroute_card(), pass context['faction_rep'] to get_unlocked_content() and use the result to (a) boost matching faction cards in the pool, (b) include faction-specific cards only when rep>=50. Use FACTION_THRESHOLD_CONTENT=50 from merlin_constants.gd. CALL-SITE GREP REQUIRED after implementation.
notes: IMPLEMENTED: Added _faction_cards_pool, _load_faction_cards(), _get_unlocked_faction_cards(). Wired MerlinReputationSystem.get_unlocked_content() into get_fastroute_card(). Faction cards (20 total) now gated behind rep>=50. Call-site grep PASS.
